title: $WEBGEN_X_FOR_DEFAULT
text: $WEBGEN_X_FOR_DEFAULT Determines the default value of the x-for placeholder attribute for associated labels in static server pages. $WEBGEN_X_FOR_DEFAULT { = } 1 | 0 Values 1 — webgen generates a for attribute for each associated label. It has the same value as the field's name attribute. This is equivalent to adding x-for="1" to each <xsubst type="label"> tag in USP layouts. 0 — webgen does not generate an id attribute with the same value as the name attribute. This is equivalent to adding x-for="0" to each <xsubst type="label"> tag for fields in the USP layout. Defaults Assignment file: Any application assignment file Section: [WEB] Default value: 0 Description By default, webgen does not generate for attributes for associated labels in static server pages. It is possible to change this behavior globally by setting $WEBGEN_X_FOR_DEFAULT to 1 , or locally by adding x-for="1" to the <x-subst type="label"> . For more information, see the "x-for" topic. Example: Generating for Attributes by Default [WEB] $WEBGEN_X_ID_DEFAULT = True ; cause webgen to generate 'id' attributes for fields $WEBGEN_X_ID_INSNAME = True ; cause webgen to append the USP instance name to the id attribute $WEBGEN_X_FOR_DEFAULT = True ; cause webgen to generate 'for' attribute for associated labels Copy Related Links <x-subst type="WidgetType"> XHTML placeholder for the USP widget and field data that will be generated in the HTML sent to the browser.
